MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-08-2020 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR JURY ON OCT-26-2020 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. JEFFREY LOWENTHAL, ESQ. AND EDWARD SMITH, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF AND CROSS-DEFENDANT LAUREL HEIGHTS PARTNERS LLC VIA COURTCALL. ERIC BUESCHER, ESQ. AND EMANUEL TOWNSEND, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT AND CROSS-COMPLAINANT OPEN SPACE PRESERVATION SOCEITY, INC. VIA COURTCALL. JUDGE FENG MAKES A DISCLOSURE THAT HE KNOWS MR. LOWENTHAL SINCE 7TH GRADE BUT THEY DON'T GET TOGETHER ON ANYTHING, ONLY SEE EACH OTHER MAYBE ONCE OR TWICE AT THE BALL PARK, BUT HE IS NOT BIAS AND CAN BE FAIR AND IMPARTIAL. NO OBJECTION BY MR. BUESCHER. THE COURT CONTINUES THE TRIAL TO 10/26/20 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. A VOLUNTARY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS ASSIGNED TO JUDGE JEFFREY ROSS. PARTIES MAY APPEAR VIA COURTCALL ON 10/26/20. NOTICE WAIVED. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

THE COURT ASSIGNED A FURTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE BEFORE THE HONORABLE JEFFREY ROSS IN DEPT. 502 AS PARTIES ARE AGREEABLE TO CONTINUE SETTLEMENT DISCUSSSIONS WITH JUDGE ROSS. PARTIES TO E-MAIL JUDGE ROSS TO COORDINATE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULING. IF THE CASE DOES NOT SETTLE, PARTIES ORDERED TO RETURN FOR TRIAL CALL ON NOV-18-2020 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL PARTIES ORDERED PRESENT. PARTIES MAY APPEAR BY COURTCALL, HOWEVER IF THE CASE IS ASSIGNED OUT TO A TRIAL DEPARTMENT, PARTIES MUST BE ABLE TO APPEAR IN PERSON BY 1:30PM ON 11/18/20.
